results.original_title: Beyond the Black: Wacken Open Air 2023
results.overview: "They had their first live performance at the Wacken Festival 2014. The five-piece band around the power woman Jennifer haben plays symphonic metal. In addition to hard rock music, classical elements are also used. The band has been working on new songs in a new constellation since 2017. With their brand new album ""Beyond the Black"" underpins their status as a permanent fixture in the scene."
results.title: Beyond the Black: Wacken Open Air 2023

results.original_title: Two Steps from Hell - Wacken Open Air 2023
results.overview: Two Steps From Hell, the Los Angeles-based duo, has garnered millions of followers with their "Epic Music," featured in countless movies, trailers, series, commercials, and games, establishing them as leaders in their genre. At W:O:A, their debut festival appearance and the sole European festival in 2023, they will present a special Wacken performance accompanied by a Ukrainian Orchestra!
results.title: Two Steps from Hell - Wacken Open Air 2023

results.original_title: Battle Beast - Live at Wacken Open Air 2023
results.overview: Battle Beast played at Wacken Open Air (WOA) 2023 on Wednesday, August 2, 2023, as part of the festival's opening day, delivering their energetic power metal performance to the massive crowd with their signature catchy riffs and powerful vocals from Noora Louhimo.  Setlist: Circus of Doom, Straight to the Heart, Familiar Hell, No More Hollywood Endings, Eye of the Storm, Where Angels Fear to Fly, Bastard Son of Odin, Wings of Light, Eden, Master of Illusion, King for a Day, Beyond the Burning Skies
results.title: Battle Beast - Live at Wacken Open Air 2023

results.name: Wave, Listen to Me!
results.overview:
Minare Koda, a floor manager at a small restaurant in Sapporo, tries to deal with her bad breakup with an ex-boyfriend. In the process, she drunkenly vents her frustrations to an older man sitting next to her at a local bar. The following day, she discovers that the man works as a producer at a nearby radio station, which broadcast her drunken ramblings over the airwaves.

As Minare's voice gains her more attention than her work at the restaurant, she ends up becoming a late-night radio talk show host at the same station, trying to balance her talk show with her daytime life to make ends meet.

results.name: I Feel You Linger in the Air
results.original_name: หอมกลิ่นความรัก
results.overview: When a modern architect wakes in 1927, he finds himself drawn to a noble heir—and must choose between a future he lost and a past that feels like home.
